creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #7)
> > … Xorg crashes on startup trying to load the radeon driver with a 
> > segmentation fault. …
> 
> Here [...] the radeonkms module loads without difficulty.

I was talking about the Xorg radeon driver (radeon_drv.so from x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati), not the kernel module. The kernel module seems unrelated here.
